description: Configuration reference for deploying the Contract Redline Tool to Azure App Service

appSettings.name: AZURE_TENANT_ID
appSettings.description: Entra ID tenant ID for Graph API access

appSettings.name: AZURE_CLIENT_ID
appSettings.description: App registration client ID with Graph API permissions

appSettings.name: AZURE_CLIENT_SECRET
appSettings.description: App registration client secret (or use Managed Identity)

appSettings.name: API_KEY
appSettings.description: API key for Copilot Studio to authenticate

managedIdentity.description: Use system-assigned managed identity for Graph API access (preferred over client secret in production)

graphApiPermissions.description: Required Microsoft Graph API permissions for reading and writing SharePoint files
